variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 12663 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 12663 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 12663 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 82.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 45.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 45.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 114.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 111.0 mm

variants.title: Hydac 0072 L 003 P Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12663
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0072 L 003 P Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 12663
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0072 L 003 P Air Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
